name: Expansion Animations
description: Vehicle and interaction animations for Expansion. Not included in the bundle — must be subscribed separately.
overview:
DayZ Expansion Animations adds various animations for DayZ Expansion Vehicles. This mod doesn't add any new content on its own — it provides animation assets consumed by other Expansion modules.

## Included Animations

- Guitar animations
- Zodiac Boat animations
- Utility Boat animations
- Tractor animations
- Vodnik animations
- Bus animations
- MH6 animations
- UH1H animations
- Merlin animations

> **Important:** Due to a limitation with DayZ, only ONE animation mod can be loaded at the same time.

This mod is **not included** in the Expansion Bundle and must be subscribed to separately.
installation: Subscribe to DayZ-Expansion-Animations on the Steam Workshop.
Place the @DayZ-Expansion-Animations folder in your server's root directory.
Both clients and servers must have this mod loaded.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure @DayZ-Expansion-Animations is installed and loaded on both client and server.
Verify the mod version matches between client and server. Check .bikey files.
